title: Clean
description: Clean gives you a low-noise, easy to use vision of the world, with block boundaries clearly defined so it is easy to build things
body:
# Available with 26.2 Delectability! Clean gives you minecraft in a clear, no-nonsense way. Very low noise, very high visibility. Clean gives you a low-noise, easy to use vision of the world, with block boundaries clearly defined so it is easy to build things. Playing with Clean is a much calmer experience than vanilla, or even many simplified packs. When there is less visual noise, there are fewer things calling for your attention. When differences are clear, information you need is easily in your grasp. The visual world demands less of you, and you play with less distraction and more confidence.

The design guidelines are: * Cleanliness balanced with elegance. * Low noise. * Fidelity with vanilla: If you use blocks to create a certain feel in vanilla, the feel should be similar in Clean. * Recognizability: You should be able to naturally know what's what. * What is different looks different, what is related looks related. * Important details are clear. For example, each side shows you which way a furnace is pointing. ![grass block design](https://cleanpack.art/grass_design.png) The pack is quite complete, all blocks, mobs, items, GUI, paintings, effects... Almost all are 16x16, but a few are larger where it reduced noise a lot (such as curved rail). Some particles (such as lava sparks) are left untouched on purpose. (And versions going back to Minecraft 1.16 are available.)



Clean is a resource pack built on making the world less noisy. The textures are designed to be clear and simple. It is easy to see what things are, visual noise is reduced, and clutter is taken away. When this Is used across a landscape ... _so much less noise!_ ![Comparison of the several variants of Clarity with vanilla.](https://cleanpack.art/comparison.gif) As shown here, Clean is part of the Clean family of resource packs. The main other packs are: [Creamy](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/creamypack), which eliminates the block borders for landscape blocks and [Confluent](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/confluentpack), the connected textures version of Clean. Although visually simplified, the colors and tones are pretty faithful to vanilla. Things that look good visually in vanilla ought to look similarly good in Clean. This is a very complete pack. Pretty much everything has been smoothed, cleaned up, and reworked. The Clean family [has its own web site](https://cleanpack.art), so come on over and [check it out!](https://cleanpack.art) One way to check it out is via my RestWorld resource pack test world, which is also on [this site](https://modrinth.com/world/restworld) and [on my own site](https://cleanpack.art/restworld/index.html). Check it out! (Note to the detail geeks: This is only 99% 16x; I have prioritized simple clean look over adherence to 16x, and for a few blocks I had to choose.) ***Older versions available for download on the [Clean Website.](https://cleanpack.art/#Downloads!)***
